subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Lord of Names hath revealed as He walketh in this most exalted habitation wherein the atoms speak forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الاسماء اذ یمشی فی هذا المقر الاعلی الذی تنطق فیه الذرات
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @justice and wrath of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
